get.description:
Returns full details including lines.
- Caller must belong to either FromWarehouse or ToWarehouse.
- SuperAdmin can view any request.

put.summary: Update a pending or rejected transfer request
put.description:
- Only Pending or RejectedBySender status allowed.
- Caller must belong to FromWarehouse.
- If previously rejected, resets to Pending and clears rejection data.
- If destination changes, notification sent to new warehouse.

delete.description:
- Only Pending or RejectedBySender status allowed.
- Caller must belong to FromWarehouse.

get.description:
- Only Pending status allowed.
- Caller must belong to ToWarehouse.
- Status changes to RejectedBySender.
- Requester can later update and resend.

post.description:
- Only Pending status allowed.
- Caller must belong to ToWarehouse.
- Sender can change unit (ProductCardId) and quantity per line.
- Status: Approved (full) or PartiallyApproved (any line partial).
- Notification sent to requesting warehouse.

- Only Pending status allowed.
- Caller must belong to ToWarehouse.
- Status changes to RejectedBySender.
- Requester can later update and resend.

- Only Approved or PartiallyApproved status.
- Caller must belong to FromWarehouse.
- Status: Received or PartiallyReceived.
- Notification sent to sender warehouse.

- Only Approved or PartiallyApproved status.
- Caller must belong to FromWarehouse.
- At least one rejection reason required. Free text optional.
- Status changes to RejectedByReceiver.
